background.description: Use to push content further in the background than Main.

brand-tinted.description: Includes opacity, use for subtle hints of color but rely on fg color and icons to communicate status.

success-tinted.description: Includes opacity, use for subtle hints of color but rely on fg color and icons to communicate status.

warning-tinted.description: Includes opacity, use for subtle hints of color but rely on fg color and icons to communicate status.

danger-tinted.description: Includes opacity, use for subtle hints of color but rely on fg color and icons to communicate status.

info-tinted.description: Includes opacity, use for subtle hints of color but rely on fg color and icons to communicate status.

neutral-tinted.description: Includes opacity, use for subtle hints of color but rely on fg color and icons to communicate status.

overlay-tinted.description: Only use as background overlay for modals or other dialogs that cover other UI.

main-hover-tinted.description: Includes opacity, use for subtle hover effects on top of colored backgrounds.

raised.description: Use to push content further in the background than Main.

inner.description: Default inner shadow for all components.

node.description: Shadows for nodes in any visual experience to better lift them off the page.
